finish.name: Adaptability Traditions Finished
finish.description: Increases Colony Designation Bonuses for regular planets.

traditions.name: Enhanced Recycling
traditions.description: Building and District Strategic Resource Cost and Upkeep reduced by -15%.

traditions.name: Survival of the Fittest
traditions.description: Orbital Bombardment Damage reduced by 25% and Defense Army Damage increased by +25%.

traditions.name: Environmental Diversification
traditions.description: Habitability increased by +10%.

traditions.name: Adaptive Ecology
traditions.description: All our planets gain 1 Free Building Slot.

traditions.name: Appropriation
traditions.description: Resettlement Cost reduced by 33%.

traditions.name: Champions of the Empire
traditions.description: Per Commander and General level  Naval Capacity: +2 Per Official level  Empire Size: -2 Per Scientist level  Leader Experience Gain: +0.5%

traditions.name: The Federation
traditions.description: Unlocks Diplomacy: Form Federation Available Envoys are increased by 1.

traditions.name: Entente Coordination
traditions.description: The amount we contribute towards the Federation Naval Capacity counts for twice as much.

traditions.name: Diplomatic Networking
traditions.description: Embassies: +3 Unity Allows Advanced Diplomatic Actions without an Embassy

traditions.name: Eminent Diplomats
traditions.description: Diplomatic Acceptance: +5 Envoys Improving Relations have a 1% chance each month of acquiring a Favor.

adopt.name: Discovery Traditions
adopt.description: Unlocks Edict: Map the Stars Anomaly Research Speed increased by +20%.

traditions.name: To Boldly Go
traditions.description: Survey Speed increased by +35% and Science Ship Disengage Chance increased by +50%.

traditions.name: Databank Uplinks
traditions.description: Unlocks Edict: Research Subsidies Research Station Output increased by 20%. Research from Starbase Constructions increased by 20%.

traditions.name: Science Division
traditions.description: Research Alternatives increased by 1 and Scientist Level Cap increased by 2.

traditions.name: Polytechnic Education
traditions.description: Leader Experience Gain increased by +25% and Leader Level Cap increased by 1.

traditions.name: Imperious Architecture
traditions.description: Capital Buildings and Housing Buildings provide +100 Housing each.

traditions.name: Judgment Corps
traditions.description: Unlocks Edict: Enhanced Surveillance

traditions.name: Workplace Motivators
traditions.description: Unlocks Edict: Extended Shifts

adopt.name: Enmity Traditions
adopt.description: Pop Growth per neighboring Rival: +3%  Pop Assembly per neighboring Rival: +3%

finish.name: Enmity Finished
finish.description: Available Envoys: +1 Unlocks the Antagonistic Diplomatic Stance. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

traditions.name: Colonization Fever
traditions.description: New colonies start with 100 additional Pops.

traditions.name: A New Life
traditions.description: Pop Growth Speed increased by +10%.

traditions.name: Courier Network
traditions.description: Empire Size from Systems and Colonies is reduced by 25%.

traditions.name: Reach for the Stars
traditions.description: Starbase Influence Cost reduced by 10%.

traditions.name: Galactic Ambition
traditions.description: Starbase Upkeep reduced by 20%.

traditions.name: Utopian Dream
traditions.description: Stability increased by 5% on all our planets.

traditions.name: Trickle Up Economics
traditions.description: Trade per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +1  Amenities per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +100  Consumer Goods Upkeep per 100 [civilian.GetIcon] [civilian.GetNamePlural]: +0.1

traditions.name: Commercial Enterprise
traditions.description: Amenities per 100 [trader.GetIcon] [trader.GetNamePlural]: +200  City Districts with a Commercial Nexus, and Trade Buildings, receive additional [trader.GetIcon] [trader.GetName] Jobs.

traditions.name: Adaptive Economic Policies
traditions.description: Unlocks Consumer Benefits and Marketplace of Ideas Trade Policies, which allow us to convert a portion of our Trade into Consumer Goods or Unity.

adopt.name: Politics Traditions
adopt.description: +1 Envoy  Officials assigned to the individuals now produce 0.1 Influence per Skill Level.

finish.name: Politics Traditions Finished
finish.description: +10% Diplomatic Weight Unlocks 4 special Resolutions in the individuals. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

traditions.name: Quid Pro Quo
traditions.description: Whenever a Resolution that you supported passes, gain 1 Favor on the empire that proposed it.

traditions.name: Gravitas
traditions.description: -25% Influence cost to veto or propose Resolutions  Officials assigned to the individuals provide an additional 2.5% Diplomatic Weight per Skill Level.

traditions.name: National Agenda
traditions.description: Whenever a resolution you propose passes, gain 18 months worth of Unity.

traditions.name: Persistent Petitioners
traditions.description: After a resolution is passed by another empire, gain +25% Diplomatic Weight until one of your own resolutions passes.

traditions.name: Extraordinary Powers
traditions.description: -25% Cooldown on Council Actions (Emergency Measures and Veto).

traditions.name: Standard Construction Templates
traditions.description: Buildings and Districts have their Build Cost reduced by 10% and Build Speed increased by +25%.

traditions.name: Administrative Operations
traditions.description: Building Upkeep and District Upkeep reduced by 10%.

traditions.name: Public Works Division
traditions.description: City Districts provide 100 additional Housing. Ring World City Segments and Ecumenopolis Residential Arcologies also provide additional Housing.

traditions.name: Inspiring Agendas
traditions.description: Unlocks Agenda: Rightful Claims Unlocks Agenda: Oppose the Fallen

traditions.name: Shared Benefits
traditions.description: Whenever an Agenda is Launched:  All Councilors gain $@statecraft_amongst_peers_exp_reward|G0$ Experience per Skill Level

adopt.name: Subterfuge Traditions
adopt.description: Subterfuge-related technologies appear at 5 times the normal rate.

finish.name: Subterfuge Traditions Finished
finish.description: Successful Operations refund 50% of their Infiltration Level Cost. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

finish.name: Supremacy Traditions Finished
finish.description: Unlocks the War Doctrines Policies. Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

traditions.name: Fleet Logistics Corps
traditions.description: Ship Upkeep reduced by 10% and Naval Capacity increased by 20%.

traditions.name: Master Shipwrights
traditions.description: Ship Build Speed increased by +25%.

traditions.name: War Games
traditions.description: Fleet Command Limit increased by +20 and Admiral Level Cap is increased by 2.

traditions.name: Overwhelming Force
traditions.description: Ship Fire Rate increased by +10% and Orbital Bombardment Damage increased by +20%.

adopt.name: Synchronicity Traditions
adopt.description: Unlocks Agenda: Growth Revision Unlocks Agenda: Cognitive Revision Unlocks Agenda: Regulatory Revision Unlocks Agenda: Legion Revision Pop Upkeep: -10%

traditions.name: Integrated Preservation
traditions.description: [evaluator.GetNamePlural] reduce Deviancy by 3 Automatic Resettlement Chance: +30%

traditions.name: Synchronized Agents
traditions.description: Leader Upkeep reduced by 20%.

traditions.name: Resistance is Frugal
traditions.description: Defense Armies now produce 0.5 Unity.

traditions.name: Bulwark of Harmony
traditions.description: While in a defensive war with another empire, Ship Build Speed is increased by +33%. In addition, the Ship Fire Rate is increased by +15% for ships within your borders.

traditions.name: Defensive Zeal
traditions.description: Starbases and Defense Platforms have their Hull Points and Damage increased by 33%.

traditions.name: Adaptive Programming
traditions.description: Market Fee reduced by 10%.

traditions.name: Spatial Optimization
traditions.description: Pop Housing Usage reduced by 10%.

traditions.name: Material Analysis
traditions.description: Upkeep of all Pop Jobs is reduced by 5%.

adopt.name: Cybernetic Traditions
adopt.description: Starts a Situation to grant the founding species the Cybernetic trait

traditions.name: Transubstantiation Synthesis
traditions.description: Gain access to the Assimilation Citizenship Species Right, allowing future additions to the populace to be turned into Cyborgs.

traditions.name: Integrated Anatomy
traditions.description: Allows selection of Cyborg traits for Species Modification that can be applied to species with the Cybernetic trait.

traditions.name: Augmentation Overload
traditions.description: Augmentors per Augmentation Center: +200

traditions.name: Inevitable Assimilation
traditions.description: Allows the Assimilation of Hive-Minded Pops.

traditions.name: Metabolic Reprocessing
traditions.description: Cyborg Upkeep: -10% Empire Size from Cyborg Pops: -10%

traditions.name: Integrated Anatomy
traditions.description: Unlocks Cybernetic Traits for Species Modification.

traditions.name: Gestation Worlds
traditions.description: Gain access to the Gestation World Colony Desigation. Gestation Worlds provide [gestation_drone.GetIcon] [gestation_drone.GetName] Jobs providing Empire-wide Pop Growth Speed

adopt.name: Cybernetic Traditions
adopt.description: Assimilating Organic Pops now generates Engineering Research. Resources generated from Assimilating Organic Pops are increased.

traditions.name: Genetic Resequencing
traditions.description: Can remove Positive Traits and add Negative Traits with Species Modification

traditions.name: Engineered Genesis
traditions.description: Can alter Pop appearance with Species Modification Allows the Assimilation of Pops into or out of a Hive-Mind

traditions.name: Allelic Expression
traditions.description: Unlocks Advanced Traits for Species Modification

traditions.name: Stem Cell Stimulation
traditions.description: Building Clone Vats produce an additional +1.5 Monthly Organic Pop Growth

finish.name: Psionic Traditions Finished
finish.description: Unlocks a Special Project to form a Covenant. Edict Fund: +50 Ascension Perks Unlocked: +1

traditions.name: Psi Corps
traditions.description: Unlocks Building: Building Psi Corps

traditions.name: Great Awakening
traditions.description: All Latent Psionic species will unlock their full psionic potential. Allows Psionic Assimilation of other species, unlocking their latent abilities.

traditions.name: Breach the Shroud
traditions.description: Unlocks a Special Project to Breach the Shroud. Job Efficiency for Psionic Pops per 100 [telepath.GetIcon] [telepath.GetNamePlural]: +5%

traditions.name: Telekinesis
traditions.description: Psionic Pops Habitability: +$@telekinesis_mult|0%$ Psionic Pops Happiness: +$@telekinesis_mult|0%$

traditions.name: Clairvoyance
traditions.description: Sensor Range from Psionic Commanders: $@clairvoyance_sensor_range|0=+$

traditions.name: Psychometry
traditions.description: individuals from individuals: $@psionic_shroud_crime|0$

adopt.name: Psionic Traditions
adopt.description: Starts a Situation to grant the founding species the Psionic trait.

adopt.name: Synthetic Traditions
adopt.description: Starts a Situation to transform the founding species into a Mechanical species.

traditions.name: Transubstantiation Synthesis
traditions.description: Grants access to the Assimilation Citizenship Species Right, allowing future additions to the populace to be turned into Synths.
